name: GL365 Google Reviews — Auto-Journal + Thank-You SMS

nodes.name: Poll Every 30 Min
nodes.notes: Google doesn't offer real-time review webhooks. This polls the Google Business Profile API every 30 minutes for new reviews. Alternative: Use a Google Reviews RSS feed or Google My Business API v4.9 accounts.locations.reviews.list

nodes.name: Fetch Google Reviews
nodes.notes: Fetches reviews from Google Business Profile API. Requires OAuth2 credentials with Google My Business scope. In production, add pagination and only process reviews newer than the last poll timestamp.

nodes.name: Filter & Normalize New Reviews
nodes.notes: Filters to only reviews posted since the last poll. Determines sentiment from star rating. Marks 1-2 star reviews as critical importance for immediate attention.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{"role":"user","content":"Write ONE concise sentence for a service business CRM journal about this Google review. Rating: {{$json.rating}}/5 stars. Reviewer: {{$json.reviewer_name}}. Review text: {{$json.review_text}}"}]

nodes.name: Bad Review?
nodes.notes: Routes 1-2 star reviews to the Slack alert for immediate owner notification.

nodes.name: Slack Alert — Bad Review
nodes.notes: Immediately notifies the business owner of a bad review so they can respond quickly.

nodes.name: Good Review (Done)
nodes.notes: Positive reviews are journaled. A future enhancement can send a 'Thank you for the review!' SMS if we have the reviewer's phone number matched in our contacts.
